description: Analyzes uploaded animal images using vision capabilities. Identifies common pets (cats, dogs, rabbits, hamsters), farm animals (cows, horses, chickens, pigs), and wild animals (lions, elephants, giraffes). Responds with enthusiastic, kid-friendly language, emojis, and a short fun fact about the animal.

example_response.confidence: Confidence level: high, medium, or low
example_response.greeting_message: Enthusiastic kid-friendly message about the animal
example_response.fun_fact: Short fun fact about the animal for kids
example_response.category: Category: pet, farm, wild, or other
